setting.note: Richard Lamb loose in the Banda Oriental, the purple land east of the river: Montevideo, the estancias of the pampas, and the little towns of a country just out of civil war. Hudson rode this ground himself, and it brings Uruguay, and South America, into the atlas.

rights.originalWork: TODO: confirm. W. H. Hudson published this in 1885.
